summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. Missing test/semver-bump.bats and test/fixtures/*.txt files referenced by workflow & run-tests.sh—cannot run act. Actions not pinned to SHA (requirement violation). semver-bump.sh has portability bugs: grep -oP uses Perl regex (non-POSIX), sed -i platform variance, echo -e non-POSIX (use printf). JSON parsing via grep is fragile. run-tests.sh expects specific bats output (ok 1, 1..16 plan) but test file missing to validate. Would fail actionlint and act validation.
